title: Kenyan Sardine Tagine
description: A flavorful Kenyan-inspired stew made with sardines, roasted spices, and a hint of tagine, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add sardines, roasted ginger, roasted cumin, tagine spice mix, and tomato paste. Stir to combine.
Add chickpeas and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
Serve with steamed rice or naan bread, if desired.
